creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 202393
Self Service Password update to 1.3

There is new version of self-service-password. So I've made a patch which:

1. Updates self-service-password to new (1.3) version
2. Adding php suffix
3. pkg-message.in covers nginx configuration

I've tested this new version with poudriere. There is a log of build. Please check: http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing-php72/2019-02-26_23h53m08s/logs/self-service-password-php72-1.3.log

Thanks to Karl Oulmi for notifying about this new version.
